T0115.title: Casting Bait
T0115.definition: The act of scammers broadly distributing bait through mass phone calls, SMS messages, social media posts, or fake advertisements on gaming and online platforms. The bait is often disguised as loan offers, credit card limit increases, HPV vaccine appointments, or epidemiological surveys, waiting for potential victims to take the bait.
T0115.description: The act of scammers broadly distributing bait through mass phone calls, SMS messages, social media posts, or fake advertisements on gaming and online platforms. The bait is often disguised as loan offers, credit card limit increases, HPV vaccine appointments, or epidemiological surveys, waiting for potential victims to take the bait.
T0115.usageExample: 团伙头目在群里催问手下，‘今天的料撒得够不够多，怎么还没几条鱼咬钩’。他们说的撒鱼饵，就是看谁发的钓鱼短信链接被点开得多。
